interpretation.H2: Mission subsystem is retained as a model-specific major avionics node.
interpretation.H3: Display subsystem is retained as a model-specific major cockpit node.
interpretation.target_rule: Aircraft level is the highest known system level, as specified by PDF Tables 10-11.
interpretation.strict_rule: All-severe is a separate research metric requiring every monitored group to be severe; it is not the PDF aircraft-level rule.
interpretation.unknown_rule: Missing evidence remains unknown and is never treated as none.
